title: Amethyst+
description: Upgraded version of the original Amethyst Protector.
body:
# Amethyst+

## Introduction 
The original version of [Amethyst Protector](https://modrinth.com/mod/amethyst-protector) only protected budding amethyst blocks, with no extra features.

Now with a **built-in calculation system**, **automatic cluster-only mining**, and a **toggleable keybind & 
Also includes lost of configuration systems for users.**
Perfect for **economy servers** or **personal use**.

**Moreover**, It could be used in **servers that earns money with amethyst-releated items.**

## Important
1. Make sure it’s allowed on your server before using.
2. I respect the original creator's work. This is not a replacement or something, **I recommend checking out [original version](https://modrinth.com/mod/amethyst-protector) of this project.**

## Dependencies
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)

## Updates & Screenshots
- [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/amethyst+/gallery)
- [Changelog](https://modrinth.com/mod/amethyst+/changelog)
